jobs.title: Vietnamese Interpreter - Louisville, CO
jobs.label: ready
jobs.why: Strong communication skills and bilingual ability (English) align with interpreter role. Experience in service and teamwork supports client interaction.
jobs.gaps: No specific Vietnamese language proficiency mentioned; need to verify or acquire that skill. Also lacks formal interpretation training or certification.

jobs.title: Work From Home - Bilingual Client Services Representative
jobs.label: ready
jobs.why: Bilingual (English) and strong communication, service, and data entry skills directly support client services. Work-from-home experience may be transferable.
jobs.gaps: No specific bilingual language pair mentioned; need to confirm if Spanish or another language is required. Also lacks call center or CRM software experience.

jobs.title: Community Resident Participation Specialist-CEN-25
jobs.label: ready
jobs.why: Experience in community events, event planning, and teamwork aligns with resident participation. Communication and service skills support engagement.
jobs.gaps: No direct experience in community organizing or resident services; may need to learn specific outreach methods or local community dynamics.

jobs.title: Director Physical Plant Management (Maintenance Director)
jobs.label: reach
jobs.why: Planning and quality skills could apply to maintenance oversight, but no direct facilities management experience.
jobs.gaps: Major gaps in physical plant management, maintenance operations, budgeting, and supervisory experience. Requires extensive technical knowledge and leadership.

jobs.title: Stage Manager, Theater Program, Camp Kaleidoscope, Summer Day Camp
jobs.label: target
jobs.why: Event planning and teamwork skills are relevant to stage management. Communication and time management support coordination.
jobs.gaps: No theater or stage management experience; lacks knowledge of lighting, sound, and production logistics. Summer camp context may require youth supervision skills.
